title: Villager Brewery
description: Adds a Villager Brewery with custom Brewer Villagers that spawn in Snowy Biomes
body:
This mod adds a Villager Brewery structure to snowy biomes, where Villager Brewers craft and store their honey and potions.

![Villager Brewery](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11b4d277a053b1e8b2afa6c86cb8bb866b62d96d.jpeg)

Outside, you’ll find large boilers, a coal storage area, and a covered storage section filled with barrels and a cart.

![Outside area](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11b4d277a053b1e8b2afa6c86cb8bb866b62d96d.jpeg)

The Brewery is highly detailed. Inside, you’ll discover brewing furnaces, packing stations, cleric work areas, boilers and more.

![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19b12cd925b97e8298b3403e605bf3ee0c3478e4.jpeg)

Throughout the entire structure, you can find plenty of honey bottles and potions stored in barrels and even some hidden chests containing custom stronger potions and other brewery related loot.

![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be4232d2bbc5ae336e54272412d775b8270803bc.jpeg)

![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b23e40a1c1b20ea18dc43a5ce35f0fd049232fc3.jpeg)

The Brewer Villagers have custom trades focused on brewing related items:

![Trades](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8fa66cd153172e3398dbdade1198a3d3d398ef80.jpeg)

The Brewery can generate in Snowy Plains and Snowy Taiga biomes.

Feel free to put it in your modpack!
